title: ampelopsis glandulosa var. glabrifolia
intro: Ampelopsis glandulosa var. glabrifolia, also known as Chinese wax vine, is a type of flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting cardiovascular and respiratory health. Ampelopsis glandulosa var. glabrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to make decoctions and poultices.
